description_long: This is a human adult figure with a naturalistic body shape, standing upright with arms relaxed at the sides. The figure is dressed in a fitted top and long pants, with the clothing closely following the contours of the body. The head is proportionate to the body, and the facial features are minimally detailed, focusing on the overall silhouette. The feet are positioned flat on the ground, and the figure appears balanced and stable. The surface is uniformly colored and lacks visible textures or accessories, giving it a simplified, stylized appearance. No objects are carried, and the figure's posture suggests a neutral, stationary stance.
description: A standing adult human figure in fitted clothing, arms at sides, with a smooth, stylized surface and no visible accessories.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full face, chest, and both arms relaxed at the sides.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the head, torso, and legs, with one arm visible.
description_view_2: Back view displays the rear of the head, back, and both legs, with arms at the sides.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the profile of the head, torso, and legs, with one arm visible.
attribute_clothing_type: fitted long-sleeve top and long pants
